inputs.label: Subtotal
inputs.businessContext: The total amount of all items before any deductions or additions.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total amount of all items before any deductions or additions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Herhangi bir kesinti veya eklemeden önceki tüm kalemlerin toplam tutarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Gesamtbetrag aller Posten vor Abzügen oder Zuschlägen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant total de tous les articles avant déductions ou ajouts.
businessContext_i18n.es: El monto total de todos los artículos antes de cualquier deducción o adición.

inputs.label: Discount Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Discount rate applied to the subtotal.

businessContext_i18n.en: Discount rate applied to the subtotal.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de remise appliqué au sous-total.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de descuento aplicada al subtotal.

inputs.label: Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Tax rate applied after discount, e.g., VAT.

businessContext_i18n.en: Tax rate applied after discount, e.g., VAT.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İskonto sonrası uygulanan vergi oranı, örn. KDV.
businessContext_i18n.de: Steuersatz nach Rabatt, z. B. Mehrwertsteuer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de taxe appliqué après remise, ex. : TVA.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa impositiva aplicada después del descuento, ej. IVA.

inputs.label: Shipping Cost
inputs.businessContext: Flat shipping charge added to the invoice.

businessContext_i18n.en: Flat shipping charge added to the invoice.
businessContext_i18n.de: Pauschale Versandgebühr, die der Rechnung hinzugefügt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais d'expédition forfaitaires ajoutés à la facture.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cargo de envío fijo añadido a la factura.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
